query: UPDATE export_logs SET listingType = 'gold_pro' WHERE productName LIKE '%[Premium]%' AND listingType IS NULL; UPDATE export_logs SET listingType = 'gold_special' WHERE productName LIKE '%[Clássico]%' AND listingType IS NULL; UPDATE export_logs SET listingType = 'free' WHERE productName LIKE '%[Grátis]%' AND listingType IS NULL;
